name: Elminster's Travels Along the Sword Coast
author: Elminster
description:
The Old Mage records journeys taken when he still walked openly among mortals — observations on coastal politics, archmages in hiding, and the small kindnesses that keep civilisation from unraveling.

The tone shifts between travel diary and sermon; Elminster insists he wrote for future Harpers, not for publication, yet copies circulate in scriptoria from Baldur's Gate to Neverwinter.

name: Encyclopedia Serôsica
author: Anonymous
description:
Encyclopedia Serôsica — A regional survey written for travellers who cannot afford to learn geography from dead companions. Anonymous is credited in library catalogues; the work is dated to 1370 DR.

Maps are absent or obsolete in most copies; readers are expected to update the text with their own ink.
